calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-06-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-10-2015 Set For Trial On Jun-06-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Off Calendar

Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Plaintiffs Discovery Requests And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Denis Klavdianos, Esq., Glassberg Pollak & Associates, Tel 415.291.8320, appearing for the Plaintiff.
Ken Frucht, Esq., Law Offices of Daniel Feder, Tel. 415.218.8316, for Defendant.

The parties stipulate to Judge Pro Tem Robert F. Kane. Matter A R G U E D. Ruling: Plaintiff's DM Luxury, LLC, A Limited Liability Company's Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Plaintiffs Discovery Requests And For Monetary Sanctions is Granted in Part and Denied in Part. Sanctions in the amount of $580.00 were awarded. Plaintiff's counsel is to prepare the form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Robert F. Kane, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not Reported. (302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2015 Set For Trial On Jan-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-10-2015 Off Calendar
